abbr. 克罗伊茨费尔特—雅各布病（Creutzfeldt-Jakob disease）；中国期刊全文数据库
entries.d: n. rare (usually fatal) brain disease (usually in middle age) caused by an unidentified slow virus; characterized by progressive dementia and gradual loss of muscle control
